gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 found split-support aggregation across multiple native_probe_factories sidecars. I changed strict validation to require every included diagnostics sidecar to prove vLLM and SGLang support independently, added a split-support regression test, and re-review approved.
verification: poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests
what_changed: Strict V1 release bundles now require each native probe factory diagnostics sidecar to report supported built-in vLLM and SGLang factories.
Native factory diagnostics with supported=true now require package_importable=true and a non-empty package_version.
README and release-bundle CLI help document the supported native factory requirement.
why: V1 release publishing must prove native engine integration is available, not merely that placeholder factory paths were inspected.
